response.justification: The candidate has some relevant experience with performance optimization and various programming languages, but lacks direct experience in SoC and IP modeling, AI/deep-learning workload expertise, and hardware-software co-design.
strengths: Experience with performance optimization in various projects
Proficiency in multiple programming languages relevant to the field
Background in developing complex systems and tools
concerns: Lack of direct experience in SoC and IP modeling
No clear experience with AI/deep-learning workloads
Not directly familiar with hardware-software co-design

key_factors.factor: Lack of direct experience in SoC and IP modeling
